title: SQL Query for Inventory Levels
scenario: Write a SQL query to display the current inventory levels for all products, including the product name, quantity, and restock threshold.
constraints: Must use the GROUP BY clause to group products by category
Must use the HAVING clause to filter products with low inventory levels

evaluationCriteria.description: The query should be syntactically valid SQL
The query should meet the specified constraints
The query should accurately retrieve the current inventory levels
